headline: Waste Management Gains Attention In High Growth Multi Layer Film Recycling
summary: Waste Management (NYSE:WM) is being highlighted in new industry research as a leading player in the expanding multi-layer film recycling market. The research points to substantial projected global growth for this segment, with WM positioned as a key provider of advanced recycling capabilities.
